text:
CMS generally considers beneficiaries to be full duals if they have values of 02, 
04, or 08, and to be partial duals if they have values of 01, 03, 05, or 06. Partial duals sometimes 
divided into the QMB-only population (01) and all other partial duals (03, 05, or 06). There are 
different ways to classify dually eligible beneficiaries. Additional information regarding various ways to 
identify dually enrolled populations, refer to a CCW Technical Guidance document entitled: "Options
